2606.10819.title: Earth-OneVision: Extending Remote Sensing Multimodal Large Language Models to More Sensor Modalities and Tasks
2606.10819.paper_summary: RS-MLLMs enable natural-language understanding and spatial reasoning over earth observation imagery. However, existing models support only a narrow range of sensor types and tasks, yielding a fragmented view of the earth and leaving cross-modal geoscientific knowledge largely unexploited. This work presents Earth-OneVision, a 2B RS-MLLM that unifies six sensor modalities (i.e., optical, SAR, infrared, multispectral, temporal, and video) and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories within a single autoregressive framework. Three dedicated mechanisms address three bottlenecks. Full-Granularity Vision-Language Alignment (FGVLA) aligns multi-level visual features with the multi-dimensional language space. Spatial-Linguistic Isomorphic Serialization (SLIS) unifies heterogeneous spatial outputs as autoregressive tokens. Progressive Cross-Modality Adaptation (PCMA) decomposes the compound domain gap into sequential stages, tackling the viewpoint and imaging physics gaps in turn. To support joint training, MMRS-OneVision is constructed with ~34M QA pairs spanning all six sensor modalities and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories, substantially exceeding existing RS multimodal instruction datasets. With only 2B parameters, Earth-OneVision achieves competitive or state-of-the-art results across extensive benchmarks, consistently matching or outperforming 4B-72B RS-MLLMs. It achieves 87.52% P@0.5 on the OPT-RSVG testset for optical visual grounding and 80.68% on the SAR VQA benchmark SARLANG-Bench, exceeding 7B models by over 7%. It further achieves 75.74% recall on the BigEarthNet-MS testset for multispectral classification, and 81.94% MCQ accuracy on EarthMind-Bench for cross-modality reasoning.
2606.10819.paper_summary_zh: RS-MLLMs 使自然語言理解和空間推理能夠應用於地球觀測影像。<lb/>然而，現有模型僅支持有限範圍的傳感器類型和任務，導致對地球的觀察呈現出片段化的視角，並使跨模態地球科學知識大部分未被利用。<lb/>本研究提出了 Earth-OneVision，一個 2B RS-MLLM，統一了六種傳感器模態（即光學、SAR、紅外線、多光譜、時間和視頻）以及在單一自回歸框架內的跨傳感器融合，涵蓋 9 個任務類別。<lb/>三個專門的機制解決了三個瓶頸。<lb/>全粒度視覺-語言對齊（FGVLA）將多層次的視覺特徵與多維語言空間對齊。<lb/>空間-語言同構序列化（SLIS）將異質的空間輸出統一為自回歸標記。<lb/>漸進式跨模態適應（PCMA）將複合領域差距分解為連續階段，依次解決視角和成像物理差距。<lb/>為了支持聯合訓練，MMRS-OneVision 構建了約 3400 萬 QA 對，涵蓋所有六種傳感器模態及 9 個任務類別的跨傳感器融合，顯著超過現有的 RS 多模態指令數據集。<lb/>僅用 2B 參數，Earth-OneVision 在廣泛的基準測試中達到了競爭性或最先進的結果，始終與 4B-72B RS-MLLMs 相匹配或超越。<lb/>在 OPT-RSVG 測試集上，其光學視覺定位達到 87.52% P@0.5，而在 SAR VQA 基準 SARLANG-Bench 上達到 80.68%，超過 7B 模型超過 7%。<lb/>此外，在 BigEarthNet-MS 測試集上，其多光譜分類的召回率達到 75.74%，在 EarthMind-Bench 上的跨模態推理中達到 81.94% 的 MCQ 準確率。
2606.10819.author: Miaoxin Cai et.al.
2606.10819.authors: Miaoxin Cai, Guanqun Wang, Wei Zhang, Guangyao Zhou, Yin Zhuang, Tong Zhang, Hao Wang, He Chen, Jun Li
